mechanism_keyword_overlap: model merging (R141 prior data + Awesome-Model-Merging-Methods surveys)

note: Dental amalgam (Hg-Ag-Sn-Cu setting reaction with gamma-1/2 phases) was not tested in prior epoch. Adjacent chemistry/materials rounds (R12 chromatography, R23 Ostwald ripening, R6 Roman concrete, R198 Damascus pattern-weld) covered different chemistries. The dental-amalgam-specific phase reaction (Ag3Hg matrix + Sn-Hg weak phase) is a multi-phase composite formation, distinct from each prior.
